title: Embassy Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Embassy Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Embassy Group has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Embassy Group:
Embassy Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Group!
